vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #572. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: unify AUTO-GENERATED banner contract across migrate:vbrief stubs, spec:render, prd:render, roadmap:render

narratives.Overview: Deft has four machine-managed file writers (migrate:vbrief deprecation redirects, spec:render, prd:render, roadmap:render) using four different (or zero) banner conventions. spec:render emits none; migrate's _SPEC_AUTO_MARKERS detector is decoupled from what writers actually emit. Fix: (1) add `conventions/machine-generated-banner.md` defining the canonical 4-line banner (AUTO-GENERATED / Purpose / Source of truth / Regenerate with) with per-writer Purpose values; (2) all four writers emit the template; (3) migrate_vbrief.py::_SPEC_AUTO_MARKERS aligned with the canonical banner and `skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md` pre-cutover guard detects either legacy or current marker for one release cycle; (4) regression test in `tests/content/` parametrized over all four writers. See GitHub issue #572 for full template text, per-writer Purpose values, and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #572: unify AUTO-GENERATED banner contract across migrate/spec/prd/roadmap writers
